user.title: Choose your pump platform
user.description: Select the diabetes pump platform you want to connect.

carelink.title: Setup your Carelink account
carelink.description: Provide your session token. Please ensure that you enter the 2-letter ISO code corresponding to the country in which your account was registered. If you are logging in with a Carelink Care Partner account, please include the patient ID, which should be the username of the main Carelink account.

tandem.title: Setup your Tandem Source account
tandem.description: Enter your Tandem Diabetes Source account credentials. This connects to source.tandemdiabetes.com (US) or source.eu.tandemdiabetes.com (EU) to fetch data from your Tandem t:slim pump.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure integration
reconfigure.description: Update your integration settings. Authentication credentials are preserved from the original setup.
